EV Charger & Electrical Services in Chicago, IL

Daniel's Imperial Electric serves all of Chicago with certified EV charger installation, Tesla Powerwall, generator systems, panel upgrades, and complete electrical services.

Chicago Focus

Electrical Upgrades for Chicago Bungalows, Flats, and Detached Garages

Chicago projects usually hinge on panel capacity, detached garage runs, permit coordination, and clean work in older homes where every wall opening matters.

Chicago homeowners usually call us when they want modern electrical capacity without turning the house into a major demolition project. That means planning around older service equipment, masonry basements, finished interiors, condo parking setups, and detached garages off the alley.

Our advantage is not only installing the equipment. It is building a practical plan for the property, handling the permit path, and making sure the charger, panel, backup system, or repair work is ready for daily use long after inspection day.

Detached garage charging plans

Many Chicago EV charger installs require a thoughtful route from the main house to an alley garage, with attention to trenching, conduit protection, and future vehicle upgrades.

Older service equipment and capacity

Bungalows, two-flats, and older condos often need load calculations, subpanel decisions, or full service upgrades before a Level 2 charger or battery system makes sense.

Permit-ready electrical scope

City work moves faster when the panel, circuit sizing, disconnects, and equipment layout are planned correctly from day one instead of patched together after inspection comments.

Clean installs in finished spaces

We prioritize neat runs, minimal disruption, and code-compliant placement in basements, utility rooms, and garages that homeowners still use every day.

Popular Chicago Projects

The Services Chicago Homeowners Ask Us For Most

Most Chicago demand centers on home EV charging, service-capacity upgrades, Tesla Powerwall planning, and troubleshooting tied to older electrical systems.

EV Charger Installation

Level 2 EV charger installation for Tesla, Ford, Rivian, and all electric vehicles. Serving Chicago and nearby neighborhoods.

Electrical Panel Upgrades

Panel upgrades to support EV chargers, modern appliances, and increased electrical demand. Serving Chicago and nearby neighborhoods.

Tesla Powerwall & Battery Storage

Certified Tesla Powerwall installer — whole-home battery backup and energy storage. Serving Chicago and nearby neighborhoods.

Electrical Repair & Troubleshooting

Expert diagnosis and repair for electrical problems — flickering lights, tripped breakers, and more. Serving Chicago and nearby neighborhoods.

Chicago Questions

Planning EV Charging and Panel Work in Chicago

These are the city-specific questions we hear most often when homeowners are comparing electricians for chargers, service upgrades, and code-driven repair work.

Can you install an EV charger in a Chicago detached garage?

Yes. Many Chicago projects involve detached garages, which means we plan the feeder route, trenching or exterior conduit path, disconnect placement, and panel capacity before installation starts.

Do older Chicago homes usually need a panel upgrade for Level 2 charging?

Not always, but many bungalows, two-flats, and older condos need a load calculation before a charger is added. Some homes can use load management, while others need a panel or service upgrade to do the job safely.

Do you handle Chicago permits and inspections?

Yes. When the project requires permitting, we build the scope around code compliance from the start so the charger, panel work, or backup system is inspection-ready.
